title: AI/ML Engineer
description: Join our AI team to build intelligent logistics solutions using machine learning algorithms. Work on route optimization, demand forecasting, and predictive analytics to enhance delivery efficiency.
responsibilities: Design and implement ML models for route optimization and demand prediction
Develop AI-powered chatbots for customer support automation
Build computer vision solutions for package verification and tracking
Optimize existing ML pipelines for better performance and scalability
Collaborate with data engineers to build robust data processing systems
requirements: 3+ years experience in AI/ML development
Strong proficiency in Python, TensorFlow, PyTorch
Experience with NLP, Computer Vision, or Reinforcement Learning
Knowledge of cloud platforms (AWS/Azure/GCP)
Bachelor's/Master's in Computer Science or related field

title: Android Developer
description: Build and enhance our customer and rider Android applications. Create seamless mobile experiences with real-time GPS tracking, payment integration, and intuitive UI/UX.
responsibilities: Develop new features for customer and rider Android apps
Implement real-time GPS tracking and push notifications
Integrate payment gateways and third-party APIs
Optimize app performance and reduce battery consumption
Write clean, maintainable code with comprehensive testing
requirements: 2+ years of Android development experience
Strong knowledge of Kotlin and Java
Experience with Android SDK, Jetpack, and MVVM architecture
Familiarity with RESTful APIs and third-party libraries
Published apps on Google Play Store preferred

title: iOS Developer
description: Craft exceptional iOS experiences for our logistics platform. Develop feature-rich mobile applications with real-time tracking, secure payments, and smooth animations.
responsibilities: Build and maintain iOS applications for customers and riders
Implement CoreLocation for precise GPS tracking
Develop payment integrations using Apple Pay and other gateways
Create responsive and animated UI using SwiftUI
Ensure app security and data protection compliance
requirements: 2+ years of iOS development experience
Proficiency in Swift and SwiftUI
Experience with iOS SDK, UIKit, and Core frameworks
Knowledge of RESTful APIs and JSON parsing
Published apps on Apple App Store preferred

title: Data Scientist
description: Unlock insights from massive logistics data. Build predictive models, perform statistical analysis, and drive data-driven decision making across the organization.
responsibilities: Analyze delivery patterns and customer behavior data
Build predictive models for demand forecasting and pricing optimization
Develop dashboards and visualizations for business insights
Conduct A/B testing and statistical analysis
Collaborate with product and engineering teams on data-driven features
requirements: 3+ years of experience in data science
Strong proficiency in Python, R, SQL
Experience with scikit-learn, pandas, numpy
Knowledge of statistical modeling and hypothesis testing
Master's/PhD in Statistics, Mathematics, or related field preferred

title: Data Engineer
description: Design and build scalable data pipelines processing millions of events daily. Create robust ETL systems to power our analytics and ML infrastructure.
responsibilities: Build and maintain data pipelines for real-time and batch processing
Design data warehouse schemas and optimize queries
Implement data quality checks and monitoring systems
Work with streaming data using Kafka or similar technologies
Optimize database performance and data storage costs
requirements: 3+ years of experience in data engineering
Strong SQL and database design skills
Experience with Python, Spark, Airflow
Knowledge of cloud data services (AWS/Azure/GCP)
Familiarity with data warehousing concepts

title: Full Stack Developer
description: Own features end-to-end from frontend to backend. Build responsive web applications, RESTful APIs, and scalable microservices for our logistics platform.
responsibilities: Develop responsive web applications using React/Next.js
Build RESTful APIs and microservices using Node.js/Python
Design and implement database schemas
Integrate third-party APIs and payment gateways
Write automated tests and ensure code quality
requirements: 3+ years of full-stack development experience
Proficiency in JavaScript/TypeScript, React, Node.js
Experience with databases (PostgreSQL, MongoDB)
Knowledge of Git, Docker, and CI/CD pipelines
Strong problem-solving and communication skills

title: DevOps Engineer
description: Build and maintain cloud infrastructure supporting millions of deliveries. Automate deployments, ensure system reliability, and optimize infrastructure costs.
responsibilities: Manage cloud infrastructure on AWS/Azure/GCP
Implement CI/CD pipelines using Jenkins/GitHub Actions
Monitor system performance and troubleshoot issues
Automate infrastructure provisioning with Terraform/CloudFormation
Ensure security compliance and implement best practices
requirements: 3+ years of DevOps experience
Strong knowledge of AWS/Azure/GCP services
Experience with Docker, Kubernetes, Terraform
Proficiency in scripting (Bash, Python)
Understanding of networking, security, and monitoring tools

title: Marketing Executive
description: Drive growth through innovative marketing strategies. Manage digital campaigns, partnerships, and brand awareness initiatives to expand our customer base.
responsibilities: Plan and execute digital marketing campaigns across channels
Manage social media presence and content strategy
Coordinate with design team for marketing collateral
Analyze campaign performance and optimize ROI
Build partnerships with businesses and e-commerce platforms
requirements: 2+ years of marketing experience
Knowledge of digital marketing tools and analytics
Strong communication and presentation skills
Experience with social media marketing
Bachelor's in Marketing or related field

title: Product Manager (Logistics Tech)
description: Lead product strategy and roadmap for our logistics platform. Work cross-functionally with engineering, design, and operations to build products that customers love.
responsibilities: Define product vision, strategy, and roadmap
Gather requirements from stakeholders and users
Write detailed product specifications and user stories
Prioritize features and manage product backlog
Analyze metrics and iterate based on user feedback
requirements: 3+ years of product management experience
Strong understanding of logistics or tech products
Excellent communication and stakeholder management skills
Data-driven approach to decision making
MBA or Bachelor's in Engineering/Business preferred

title: UI/UX Designer
description: Design delightful user experiences for our mobile and web applications. Create intuitive interfaces that simplify complex logistics workflows.
responsibilities: Design user interfaces for mobile and web applications
Create wireframes, prototypes, and high-fidelity mockups
Conduct user research and usability testing
Maintain design system and component library
Collaborate with developers to ensure design accuracy
requirements: 2+ years of UI/UX design experience
Proficiency in Figma, Adobe XD, or Sketch
Strong portfolio showcasing mobile and web designs
Understanding of design principles and accessibility
Experience with design systems and prototyping

title: Backend Developer (Node.js/Python)
description: Build robust backend systems powering our logistics platform. Design APIs, implement business logic, and ensure system scalability and reliability.
responsibilities: Develop RESTful APIs and GraphQL services
Design and optimize database schemas
Implement authentication and authorization systems
Build microservices and event-driven architectures
Write unit tests and ensure code quality
requirements: 3+ years of backend development experience
Strong proficiency in Node.js or Python
Experience with Express, FastAPI, or Django
Knowledge of databases (PostgreSQL, MongoDB, Redis)
Understanding of system design and architecture

title: Quality Assurance Engineer
description: Ensure product quality through comprehensive testing strategies. Design test cases, automate testing, and work closely with developers to deliver bug-free software.
responsibilities: Design and execute test plans and test cases
Perform functional, regression, and performance testing
Automate testing using Selenium, Cypress, or similar tools
Identify, document, and track bugs
Collaborate with development team on quality improvements
requirements: 2+ years of QA experience
Knowledge of testing methodologies and best practices
Experience with test automation tools
Familiarity with API testing (Postman, REST Assured)
Strong analytical and problem-solving skills
